<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a React + Vite + TypeScript SPA. Use idiomatic React patterns, functional components, and hooks. Integrate with a FastAPI backend at /api/routes for data. Include a placeholder map component and example API call in the main page.
